_schema: technology_watchlist v0 — flat term list for Flow-source triage
_owner_curates: OWNER-CURATED. This is the relevance gate for the 50 Flow sources of the Technology stream: a Flow article is worklisted for extraction ONLY IF its title+body contains >=1 term below (case-insensitive, token/word-boundary — 'AI' matches 'AI chips' but not 'again'). Deep sources ignore this list (extract-all). Curate freely: add the tickers, companies, technologies, people, and agenda themes you actually want surfaced; prune noise. Order does not matter. This seed was drawn from the source categories in technology_sources.json and is a STARTING POINT, not a finished list. TUNE AFTER CANARY together with N_FLOW / N_FIREHOSE in scripts/collect_technology.py.
_notes: Matching is substring-on-word-boundaries, case-insensitive. Multi-word terms ('United States', 'export controls') match as a phrase.
Short/ambiguous tokens (2-3 chars) match aggressively across articles — keep only high-signal ones (e.g. 'TSM', 'ASML', 'TPU').
An empty terms list DISABLES the gate (all Flow articles pass, with a warning) — the collector still runs while you curate.
Terms are OR-ed: any single hit worklists the article.
